items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

items.title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
items.summary: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

items.title: Pope says he has 'no fear' of Trump after scathing criticism
items.summary: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 中國要求放棄承認台灣 帛琉總統強調：自主選擇友邦
items.summary: 帛琉總統惠恕仁今天告訴法新社，北京當局曾「非常直接地」要帛琉放棄對台灣的外交承認，但帛琉不接受他人決定其友邦。他並提到，全球石油危機對帛琉百姓造成巨大衝擊。  法新社報導，惠恕仁（Sur...…

items.title: 日本京都男童失蹤近3週 警方搜山「尋獲兒童遺體」身分待確認
items.summary: 住在日本京都府的11歲男童安達結希，上月底在上學途中突然失蹤，警方獲報後隨即投入大量人力搜索，也未能立即找到其下落，消息引發日本全國關注。安達結希離奇失蹤近3個星期後，警方今（1...…
